title: Tanker Shipping - June 16, 2026
summary: The VLCC tanker market is transitioning from a disruption-driven environment towards supply-demand fundamentals, driven by expectations of a U.S.-Iran agreement and reduced geopolitical risks. Freight rates have softened, but newbuilding activity remains high, potentially leading to a future supply imbalance and industry downcycle. Oil prices have fallen due to the agreement, anticipating increased supply and maintained between $80-$90 per barrel.
